hooks.command: branch=$(git -C /home/user/talk branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); unpushed=$(git -C /home/user/talk log origin/$branch..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); unstaged=$(git -C /home/user/talk status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$unpushed" -gt 0 ] || [ "$unstaged" -gt 0 ]; then git -C /home/user/talk push -u origin "$branch" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "Git push successful!"}' || echo '{"systemMessage": "Auto-push failed (403). Changes saved locally. Push will be retried when GitHub MCP tools are available."}'; fi
